message: feat: Add deterministic workflows and new API endpoints for metrics and session history.
feat: Replace the old dashboard with a new FastAPI API server and introduce LLM run metrics collection.
feat: Add heartbeat handling to agent, new playbook strategies, and Matrix voice message support.
feat: Introduce webhook server, add file deletion tool, and include new playbook entry.
feat: Add Reddit integration for fetching trending posts, subreddit content, and search results.
feat: Make the `media` tool asynchronous, expand its documentation to include PDF page analysis, and refine NVIDIA API call parameters while removing 'analiza' from the storage tool mapping.
refactor: Delegate image-based PDF analysis to `describe_image` by removing internal vision logic and updating tool mappings.
feat: Run image vision analysis in a separate thread with an increased timeout and associate the 'analiza' keyword with the storage tool.
feat: Add PDF reading and analysis capabilities, including vision fallback for image-based PDFs, and enable file handling in the Matrix client.
feat: Add text cleaning for TTS to remove emojis, markdown, and extra symbols.
feat: Implement voice response functionality by detecting user intent, stripping voice commands, and routing messages to the agent with a `voice_only` flag.
feat: Expand voice command detection and strip audio request instructions from messages sent to the agent.
feat: Implement multi-LLM routing for tools, add text-to-speech output, and expand the agent's toolset.
feat: Add Supabase S3 file storage tools to the agent, enabling upload, list, download, and delete operations.
refactor: improve agent search  JSON parsing, clean web search snippets, reduce agent history context, silence noisy logs, simplify user profile, and remove an old sprint plan.
feat: Migrated embedding router to NVIDIA NIM API with disk-cached tool centroids and introduced a new playbook module.
feat: integrate Nvidia models, implement background task execution, persist reminders with MongoDB, and refine LLM response cleaning.
feat: Implement semantic tool group routing with embeddings as a fallback for keyword-based intent detection.
feat: Implement tool group routing for dynamic agent tool loading, update LLM models, and refine current time retrieval.
feat: Implement audio message transcription via Groq Whisper with ffmpeg chunking and refactor agent system prompt for clarity.
feat: document new Coordinator + ReAct pattern, OpenAI LLM stack, and expanded toolset.
feat: Migrate LLM provider from Nvidia to OpenAI and refactor agent architecture to dynamically select specialized agents based on message intent.
feat: Implement natural language time parsing for the `set_reminder` tool, integrate reminder notifications, and update agent instructions and context management.
feat: Implement SmartThings token auto-refresh and refactor agent to use specialized LLMs for chat, function, and vision, while simplifying email reading logic.
Merge origin/feature/migration-agno into main: Resolve conflicts and complete Agno migration
feat: Introduce agent core with IMAP email reader, summarizer, and deep think tools.
feat: Implement new agent architecture with Agno integration, core components, image generation, email reading tools, and comprehensive tests.
feat: Introduce Agno agent framework with centralized tool registration, new agent components, and expanded toolset.
fix: resolve memory leak, repetitive emails, and hallucinated summaries
Merge branch 'main' into feature/migration-agno
chore: save current state before agno migration
feat: google calendar api integration, news/weather fixes and code cleanup
docs: add Agno to stack table
chore: add deploy.sh for Digital Ocean setup
docs: README completo para Jada v0.5.2
merge: feature/migracion-jada -> main (Jada v0.5.2)
feat: heartbeat reads soul.md + heartbeat.md tone section for LLM
fix: scheduler recalculates next_run_at if null or >7d away
fix: email_list in CORE_TOOLS + keyword expansion
chore: gitignore + untrack runtime files
fix: kimi-k2-thinking primary + minimax fallback + max_tokens param
feat: Kimi K2 primary model + full soul.md in context + better rules
feat: watchdog timeout + nudge messages for slow LLM calls
fix: typing_state= not typing= in room_typing (nio API)
fix: cronjob tools always in CORE_TOOLS + explicit workflow in schemas
fix: add cancela/pausa/elimina keywords to cronjob routing
fix: heartbeat cron 5-field + dashboard UI polish
feat: dashboard Next.js + heartbeat + soul con personalidad
feat: Next.js dashboard + heartbeat + personality
feat: personality + heartbeat + typing fix
fix: cronjob deduplication + clean duplicate from JSON
fix: double response + typing indicator + cronjob keywords
chore: banner — 'powered by NVIDIA NIM' -> '5panes'
feat: --livelogs mode + dispatcher singleton optimization
feat(phase6): enhanced memory with auto-compression + fact deduplication
feat(phase5): agent-level scheduler with asyncio + Agno cron utilities
feat(phase4): replace manual JSON schemas with compact _fn() helper
feat(phase3): migrate LLM client to Agno Nvidia model provider
chore: cleanup merged branches + rename remaining MiniClaw refs to Jada
Merge remote-tracking branch 'remotes/origin/feature/cronjobs-gui' into feature/migracion-jada
Merge remote-tracking branch 'remotes/origin/security-audit-2026-02-25' into feature/migracion-jada
feat: rename project MiniClaw -> Jada + add ASCII startup banner
feat(cronjobs): Completar feature de gestión de cronjobs con GUI
feat(cronjobs): Implementar backend completo de gestión de cronjobs
security: Change to WHITELIST mode for commands
security: Fix rm -rf blocking bug
security: Add security improvements and policies
Merge branch 'main' of https://github.com/judmontoyaso/mini_claw
feat: Add a new `gym_db` tool for MongoDB-based gym workout management and update MongoDB URI examples in configuration files.
Delete monitor-correo.ps1
feat: Add deep thinking sub-agent and Samsung TV control tool, alongside a new agent core with categorized tool loading.
feat: Add SmartThings TV control, email monitoring, and a deep thinking agent.
feat: Implement the initial ReAct agent architecture, including core logic, persistent memory, and a suite of tools.
